issues.title: Enemy dealt 24 dmg (56% of 43 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 7 (seq 125), the enemy dealt 24 damage which is 56% of the player's 43 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 24 dmg (71% of 34 HP) on floor 9
issues.description: On floor 9, encounter 2, turn 5 (seq 541), the enemy dealt 24 damage which is 71% of the player's 34 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 16 dmg (100% of 16 HP) on floor 9
issues.description: On floor 9, encounter 2, turn 11 (seq 565), the enemy dealt 16 damage which is 100% of the player's 16 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1)
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90% HP (>72). Encounters: F1E0:78HP, F1E1:78HP, F1E2:76HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.

issues.title: 4 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 4 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90% HP (>72). Encounters: F1E0:78HP, F1E1:78HP, F1E2:76HP, F2E0:74HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.

issues.title: Player never exceeded 60% HP after floor 3 (max: 44)
issues.description: After floor 3, the player's HP never exceeded 44 (threshold: 48, which is 60% of 80 max HP). This suggests healing mechanics are insufficient to sustain the player in later floors.
reproductionSteps: Floors 4+: check healing card availability and heal amounts

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 15 turns vs prev floor avg 3.3
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 took 15 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: the_curator (boss).

issues.title: Floor 6 enc 2: 17 turns vs prev floor avg 4.0
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 took 17 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 4.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: knowledge_golem (boss).

issues.title: Floor 8 enc 2: 8 turns vs prev floor avg 3.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 8 took 8 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.7 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: stone_sentinel (mini_boss).

issues.title: Floor 9 enc 2: 11 turns vs prev floor avg 4.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 9 took 11 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 4.7 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: the_curator (boss).

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (391 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
